name: Hyperbrowser
description: Hyperbrowser cloud browser API for AI agents. Async scrape and crawl jobs, plus full browser session lifecycle for agentic workflows. Returns content as markdown or HTML.

credential_fields.name: token
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Hyperbrowser API key from https://app.hyperbrowser.ai (Settings > API Keys).

tools.name: start_scrape
tools.description: Start an async scrape job for a single URL. Returns a jobId; poll get_scrape_job until status is 'completed'. The result includes the page content in the requested formats (markdown, html, links, screenshot).

scrapeOptions.description: Output options. Common fields: formats (array of 'markdown'|'html'|'links'|'screenshot'), onlyMainContent (boolean), waitFor (ms), timeout (ms), excludeTags / includeTags (selector arrays).

sessionOptions.description: Browser-session settings: useProxy (boolean), solveCaptchas (boolean), useStealth (boolean), profile.id (reuse a saved profile).

tools.name: get_scrape_job
tools.description: Get the status and result of a scrape job. Status is one of pending, running, completed, failed. When completed, the response includes the scraped data.

tools.name: start_crawl
tools.description: Start an async crawl job that walks a site starting from a seed URL. Returns a jobId; poll get_crawl_job until status is 'completed'. Each crawled page is returned with its content in the requested formats.

maxPages.description: Maximum number of pages to crawl.

followLinks.description: Follow links found on each page.

excludePatterns.description: Glob patterns of URLs to skip.

includePatterns.description: Only crawl URLs matching these patterns.

scrapeOptions.description: Per-page scrape options (same shape as start_scrape.scrapeOptions).

tools.name: get_crawl_job
tools.description: Get the status and accumulated results of a crawl job.

tools.name: create_session
tools.description: Create a live browser session for interactive automation (Playwright/Puppeteer connect via the returned wsEndpoint). Sessions persist cookies and storage until stopped.

profile.description: Reuse a saved authenticated profile: { id: 'profile_id' }.

tools.name: get_session
tools.description: Get details for a live session: status, wsEndpoint, live-view URL.

tools.name: stop_session
tools.description: Stop a live browser session and release its resources.
